notes: All via HTTP except Python FlashMLX (direct). 64-128 tok/req, temperature=0

summary.0.6B: FlashMLX server beats all at C=1 (232). LM Studio leads C=4 (326) due to continuous batching.
summary.8B_llama: LM Studio leads (83 at C=4). FlashMLX matches Python engine. Ollama competitive at C=1.
summary.8B_qwen: FlashMLX server matches Python engine (52), beats ollama (41) by 28%.
summary.key_insight: C++ server matches or beats Python engine across all models. Quantized embedding pre-dequant + bfloat16 cache + N-step batching are the key optimizations. Heterogeneous offset batching needed for C=4+ scaling.
